DescribePodEvents.resourcePoolId: Unique identifier of the resource pool; for self-managed resource pools pass the pool ID (e.g. cce-1uji3ib5), for managed resource pools pass aihc-serverless
DescribePodEvents.queueID: Queue to which the training job belongs; for self-managed resource pools provide the queue name, for managed resource pools provide the queue ID
DescribePodEvents.podName: Node name of the training job
DescribePodEvents.startTime: Start time for pod events of the job; defaults to the pod creation time
DescribePodEvents.endTime: End time for pod events of the job; defaults to now
